ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales data point */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales data */,
  "store_nbr" INTEGER /* Store number */,
  "family" TEXT /* Product family */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit */,
  "total_discount" REAL /* Total discount applied to the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the transaction */,
  "time_of_sale" TEXT /* Time of the sale */,
  "return_flag" INTEGER /* Whether the sale was a return */,
  "return_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity returned */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales amount */,
  "onpromotion" INTEGER /* Whether the product was on promotion */,
  "national_holi" INTEGER /* Whether it was a national holiday */,
  "local_holi" INTEGER /* Whether it was a local holiday */,
  "regional_holi" INTEGER /* Whether it was a regional holiday */,
  "new_year" INTEGER /* Whether it was a new year */,
  "payday" INTEGER /* Whether it was a payday */,
  "earthquake" INTEGER /* Whether there was an earthquake */,
  "dow" INTEGER /* Day of the week */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month */,
  "dcoilwtico" REAL /* Diesel oil price */,
  "percip" REAL /* Precipitation */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature */,
  "resid" REAL /* Residual value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_family FOREIGN KEY ("family") REFERENCES families ("family_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_store_nbr FOREIGN KEY ("store_nbr") REFERENCES stores ("store_nbr")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_nbr" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "store_city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "store_state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "store_zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the store */,
  "store_manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "store_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "store_email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "store_open_date" TEXT /* Date the store opened */,
  "store_close_date" TEXT /* Date the store closed (if applicable) */,
  "store_area" REAL /* Area of the store in square meters */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., flagship, outlet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_nbr")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the product family */,
  "parent_family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent product family (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "family_description" TEXT /* Description of the product family */,
  "category" TEXT /* Main category of the product family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the environmental data */,
  "dcoilwtico" REAL /* Diesel oil price */,
  "percip" REAL /* Precipitation */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "uv_index" REAL /* UV index */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "national_holi" INTEGER /* Whether it was a national holiday */,
  "local_holi" INTEGER /* Whether it was a local holiday */,
  "regional_holi" INTEGER /* Whether it was a regional holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., public, cultural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "earthquakes" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the earthquake */,
  "earthquake" INTEGER /* Whether there was an earthquake */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the earthquake */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the earthquake in kilometers */,
  "epicenter" TEXT /* Location of the epicenter */,
  "affected_areas" TEXT /* Areas affected by the earthquake */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_logout" TEXT /* Date of the last logout */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_forecast" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales forecast */,
  "store_nbr" INTEGER /* Store number */,
  "family" TEXT /* Product family */,
  "forecast_sales" REAL /* Forecasted sales amount */,
  "forecast_method" TEXT /* Method used for the forecast (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  "forecast_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "store_nbr", "family")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_performance" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the store performance metrics */,
  "store_nbr" INTEGER /* Store number */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales amount */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue */,
  "foot_traffic" INTEGER /* Number of visitors to the store */,
  "average_transaction_value" REAL /* Average value of transactions */,
  "customer_satisfaction" REAL /* Customer satisfaction score */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees working in the store */,
  "employee_turnover" REAL /* Employee turnover rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "store_nbr")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_performance" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the product performance metrics */,
  "family" TEXT /* Product family */,
  "sales" REAL /* Sales amount */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "return_rate" REAL /* Rate of returns for the product */,
  "out_of_stock_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the product was out of stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "family")
)
